form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (30.26) when sixth over 515m at this track in a Grade 5. Has three wins and five placings from 14 starts from the draw. Looks a leading chance.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked turning off back straight and fell.

form.formComment: Got back last start and could only manage fifth but before that won by 1.5 lengths at Warragul (25.92) beating Dr. Paris in a Grade 5 on April 3. Racing well and has to be included.

form.formComment: Recorded a half a length win (30.26) in a Grade 5 last time at The Meadows. Goes very well from the draw boasting three victories and two places from nine starts. Suited here and expected to run well.
